zh.Les Essarts, La Roche-sur-Yon, Vendée, P: 法國波代萊斯 艾薩次
zh.South Tawton, Devon, England: 英國戴文素斯 塔福頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Aenor de Brosse Dame de Essarts於大約1199年出生在法國波代萊斯 艾薩次時，她的父親Bernard de Brosse IV44歲，母親Aumur de THOUARS25歲。她於1219年與Thibault Chabot在法國艾-吉洛易艾薩次結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1250年在法國波代武瓦特享年52歲。

zh-hans.Les Essarts, La Roche-sur-Yon, Vendée, P: 法国波代萊斯 艾薩次
zh-hans.South Tawton, Devon, England: 英国戴文素斯 塔福頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Aenor de Brosse Dame de Essarts于大约1199年出生在法国波代萊斯 艾薩次时，她的父亲Bernard de Brosse IV44岁，母亲Aumur de THOUARS25岁。她于1219年与Thibault Chabot在法国艾-吉洛易艾薩次结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1250年在法国波代武瓦特享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Brosse
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of German Braus or its variant Brauss, and of Brause .

nameMeanings.name: Aenor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Apparently a form of Gaynor adapted to Welsh orthography. It also may have been influenced by the name of the saint commemorated at Llangeinwyr in Glamorgan, known popularly as Llangeinor. Her name is derived from Welsh cain ‘beautiful’ + (g)wyry(f) ‘maiden’.

en.lifeSummary: When Aenor de Brosse Dame de Essarts was born about 1199, in Les Essarts, Vendée, France, her father, Bernard de Brosse IV, was 44 and her mother, Aumur de THOUARS, was 25. She married Thibault Chabot in 1219, in Essarts, Eure-et-Loir, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1250, in Vouvant, Vendée, France, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Aenor de Brosse Dame d’Essarts est née environ 1199, à Les Essarts, Vendée, France, son père, Bernard de Brosse IV, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Aumur de THOUARS, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Thibault Chabot en 1219, à Essarts, Eure-et-Loir, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1250, à Vouvant, Vendée, France, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Aenor de Brosse Dame de Essarts um 1199 in Les Essarts, Vendée, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Bernard de Brosse IV 44 und ihre Mutter Aumur de THOUARS 25. Sie hat 1219 in Essarts, Eure-et-Loir, Frankreich Thibault Chabot geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1250 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Vouvant, Vendée, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Aenor de Brosse Dame de Essarts è nata il circa 1199 nel Les Essarts, Vendée, Francia, sua padre, Bernard de Brosse IV, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Aumur de THOUARS, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Thibault Chabot nel 1219, nel Essarts, Eure-et-Loir, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1250, nel Vouvant, Vendée, Francia, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Aenor de Brosse Dame de Essartsが約1199年にフランスベンドeレス エッサルツで生まれた時，父Bernard de Brosse IVは44歳，母Aumur de THOUARSは25歳であった。1219年にフランスエウレ-エト-ロイルエッサルツでThibault Chabotと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1250年にフランスベンドeボウヴァントで52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Aenor de Brosse Dame de Essarts(이)가 대략 1199년 프랑스 븐드e 레스 에사르츠에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Bernard de Brosse IV(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Aumur de THOUARS(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1219년 프랑스 우레-트-로이르 에사르츠에서 Thibault Chabot(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1250년 프랑스 븐드e 보우반트에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Aenor de Brosse Dame de Essarts nasceu aproximadamente 1199, em Les Essarts, Vendée, França, seu pai, Bernard de Brosse IV, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Aumur de THOUARS, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Thibault Chabot em 1219, em Essarts, Eure-et-Loir, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1250, em Vouvant, Vendée, França, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Aenor de Brosse Dame de Essarts родилась около 1199 г. в местности лесь эссарц, вендe, Франция, её отцу по имени Bernard de Brosse IV было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Aumur de THOUARS, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thibault Chabot в 1219 г. в местности эссарц, эуре-ет-лоир, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1250 г. в местности фоувант, вендe, Франция в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Aenor de Brosse Dame de Essarts nació aproximadamente 1199, en Les Essarts, Vendée, Francia, su papá, Bernard de Brosse IV, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Aumur de THOUARS, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Thibault Chabot en 1219, en Essarts, Eure-et-Loir, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1250, en Vouvant, Vendée, Francia, a la edad de 52 años.
